endpoints.label: Create Post

fields.label: Account
fields.description: The Google Business Profile account (provide the ID)

fields.label: Location
fields.description: The specific location or business associated with the account (provide the ID)

fields.label: Post Type
fields.description: The type of post to create (standard, event, offer, or alert)

fields.label: Summary
fields.description: The main text of the post

fields.label: Title
fields.description: E.g. Sales this week.

fields.label: Start Date and Time
fields.description: The start date and time of the event (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: End Date and Time
fields.description: The end date and time of the event (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Start Date
fields.description: The start date of the offer

fields.label: End Date
fields.description: The end date of the offer

fields.label: Alert Type
fields.description: The sub-type of the alert

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: languageCode, callToActionType, url, couponCode, redeemOnlineUrl, termsConditions)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: summary, languageCode, callToActionType, url, startDateTime, endDateTime, title, startDate, endDate, couponCode, redeemOnlineUrl, termsConditions)
